    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    T

    Task - Class in main.java.taskmanager.model
    Represents a Task managed by the application A Task contains a description, creation date, due date and completion date, a task is considered incomplete until completionDate has a date
    Task(String, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class main.java.taskmanager.model.Task
    Creates a new incomplete task
    Task(UUID, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class main.java.taskmanager.model.Task
    Recreates a task from existing stored Data
    main.java.taskmanager - package main.java.taskmanager
     
    TaskManager - Class in main.java.taskmanager.service
    Service class responsible for managing tasks
    TaskManager(TaskRepository) - Constructor for class main.java.taskmanager.service.TaskManager
     
    main.java.taskmanager.model - package main.java.taskmanager.model
     
    main.java.taskmanager.repository - package main.java.taskmanager.repository
     
    main.java.taskmanager.service - package main.java.taskmanager.service
     
    main.java.taskmanager.UI.CLI - package main.java.taskmanager.UI.CLI
     
    TaskRepository - Interface in main.java.taskmanager.repository
    Defines the operations required to store and retrieve tasks.
    toString() - Method in class main.java.taskmanager.model.Task
